name: Michigan LARA Residential Builder and Maintenance & Alteration License Search

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official LARA/Accela lookup before relying on freshness assumptions

knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to LARA residential builder and maintenance-and-alteration license types visible in the lookup.
Local permits, business registrations, and non-LARA construction or specialty trade authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass portal controls; prefer official export options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Michigan residential builder and maintenance-and-alteration license lookup through LARA Accela.
maintainerNotes: Keep the source scope tied to visible LARA license types and avoid implying all Michigan contractor or trade credentials are covered.
